name: callout
title: Callout
description: A label-and-arrow annotation pointing at a specific spot on the canvas. The bubble appears first with a calm scale-and-fade; after a small beat the arrow draws on from the bubble to the anchor. For highlighting UI in tutorials, naming parts in explainers, or drawing attention without obscuring content.
pickWhen: naming a specific point — UI element, part of a diagram, feature in a screenshot. Use `bounding-box` to frame a whole region instead.
